strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js product work at multiple Berlin companies
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No stated Nest.js or Vitest experience, both core to the primary stack
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role
Significant investment in niche DLang ecosystem; Kotlin/Python proficiency not evidenced

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with broad, senior-level fullstack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes, plus rare direct experience in AI agent infrastructure — an explicit requirement here. Testing expertise and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) align well with the role's quality focus. The main gaps are framework-specific: no evidence of Nest.js or Vitest, and React depth is thinner than the Ember background, but these are learnable for someone with this track record.
